caption: The video shows a person driving an all-terrain vehicle (ATV) into a garage. The ATV is black with large, rugged tires and a front rack. The driver is wearing a dark jacket and appears to be maneuvering the vehicle carefully as they enter the space. Inside the garage, there are various items visible, including a stack of tires on the right side and some tools and equipment scattered around. The garage door is open, allowing natural light to illuminate the scene. As the ATV moves forward, it passes by the stack of tires, and the driver seems focused on positioning the vehicle correctly within the confined space. The overall setting suggests a typical garage environment used for storing and maintaining vehicles and other equipment.
